titolo: L'Ombra e il Riflesso: Interfaccia tra Sabbia e Acqua
contenuto:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 500" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="800" height="500" fill="#05070a" />
  
  <!-- Sfondo Dicotomico: Giorno d'ambra minerale / Notte di cobalto notturno -->
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a140e" />
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#0a0d14" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#020b18" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sandGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2a1f14" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0f0b07" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="waterGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#041220" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#01050a" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect x="0" y="0" width="800" height="280" fill="url(#skyGrad)" />
  <rect x="0" y="280" width="400" height="220" fill="url(#sandGrad)" />
  <rect x="400" y="280" width="400" height="220" fill="url(#waterGrad)" />

  <!-- Linea di Confine / Frattale centrale (Specchio) -->
  <line x1="400" y1="0" x2="400" y2="500" stroke="#80ed99" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 4" opacity="0.6" />

  <!-- PARTE SINISTRA: GIZA (Sabbia, Ombra netta, Luce Solare) -->
  <!-- Sole d'oro tenue -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="80" r="30" fill="#ffb703" opacity="0.3" />
  <!-- Piramide -->
  <polygon points="180,280 100,140 20,280" fill="#d4a373" opacity="0.8" />
  <polygon points="100,140 180,280 230,280" fill="#8a5a36" opacity="0.9" />
  <!-- Ombra netta proiettata sulla sabbia -->
  <polygon points="20,280 180,280 280,420 0,360" fill="#000000" opacity="0.6" />
  <!-- Testo di sintesi -->
  <text x="40" y="460" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="#d4a373" opacity="0.7">TERRENO: SABBIA (c_minerale)</text>
  <text x="40" y="478" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="#8a5a36" opacity="0.5">PROIEZIONE: OMBRA NETTA / STASI</text>

  <!-- PARTE DESTRA: SHANGHAI (Acqua, Neon frantumato, Frequenza) -->
  <!-- Torri Neon -->
  <rect x="520" y="100" width="20" height="180" fill="#00b4d8" opacity="0.8" />
  <polygon points="530,60 520,100 540,100" fill="#00b4d8" />
  <rect x="600" y="130" width="35" height="150" fill="#f72585" opacity="0.7" />
  <circle cx="680" cy="150" r="15" fill="#7209b7" opacity="0.9" />
  <line x1="680" y1="100" x2="680" y2="280" stroke="#7209b7" stroke-width="4" />

  <!-- Riflessi nell'Acqua increspata (Onde di neon) -->
  <path d="M 420 310 Q 480 305 540 310 T 660 310 T 780 310" stroke="#00b4d8" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M 450 340 Q 520 335 590 340 T 730 340" stroke="#f72585" stroke-width="3" fill="none" opacity="0.8" />
  <path d="M 410 380 Q 500 375 600 380 T 760 380" stroke="#7209b7" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0.6" />
  <path d="M 480 420 Q 560 415 640 420 T 790 420" stroke="#00b4d8" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" opacity="0.5" />
  <path d="M 430 450 Q 510 445 610 450 T 720 450" stroke="#f72585" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.4" />

  <text x="440" y="460" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="#00b4d8" opacity="0.7">TERRENO: ACQUA (c_fluido)</text>
  <text x="440" y="478" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="#f72585" opacity="0.5">PROIEZIONE: RIFLESSO / OSCILLAZIONE</text>

  <!-- Equazione centrale -->
  <rect x="260" y="20" width="280" height="35" fill="#070a0f" rx="6" stroke="#80ed99" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.9" />
  <text x="400" y="42" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#80ed99" text-anchor="middle">z(t+1) = z(t)² + c</text>
</svg>
